title: High stakes battle in Kishanganj as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Kishanganj. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Bihar Elections 2025: Key issues dominate debates in Kishanganj
snippet_text: As the election campaign intensifies, voters in Kishanganj assembly constituency raise questions about infrastructure development, road connectivity, and agricultural support schemes.

title: Flood protection works in Kishanganj inspected by state cabinet delegation
snippet_text: With local embankments requiring urgent reinforcements, the local flood relief work has become a major talking point in Kishanganj.

title: Independent candidates emerge as spoilers in Kishanganj triangular contest
snippet_text: With rebel leaders refusing to withdraw their nominations in Kishanganj, political analysts predict a tight multi-cornered fight.
